result.reason: Multi SSH grid functionality will enhance user productivity by allowing simultaneous viewing and interaction with multiple SSH sessions, fulfilling a new feature request.
result.approach: Develop new UI controls for a grid layout to host multiple SSH sessions, integrate existing SSH connection logic to manage multiple instances efficiently, and update connection management to support grouped SSH sessions.
